title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
desc: The host conducts various rounds of exciting games for women from diverse backgrounds, who compete against each other to win cash prizes.

title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh S01
desc: A fun game show for women where winners earn one lakh rupees. Each episode features exciting challenges and supports women's dreams across Bengal.

title: Brindaban Bilashini
desc: Brindaban Bilashini explores regional cultural practices, devotional stories, and festival celebrations, showcasing rich heritage and community rituals to educate and entertain viewers.

title: Roopmati
desc: A boy disguises himself as a girl to see the girl he loves, despite her father's disapproval, leading to a tale of romance and challenges.
